---
title: "Corenet: A flexible framework for generating and prioritising core cycle network designs"
description: "Zhao Wang, Hang Hu, Hussein Mahfouz, Juan Pablo Fonseca-Zamora, Martin Lucas-Smith, Dustin Carlino, Angus Calder, Congying Hu, Matthew Davis, Joseph Talbot, and Robin Lovelace (2026). Corenet: A flexible framework for generating and prioritising core cycle network designs. *Journal of Transport Geography*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2026.104549"
date: "2026-02-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "wang_corenet_2026"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Journal of Transport Geography"
doi: "10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2026.104549"
publication-url: "https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0966692326000037"
authors:
  - "Zhao Wang"
  - "Hang Hu"
  - "Hussein Mahfouz"
  - "Juan Pablo Fonseca-Zamora"
  - "Martin Lucas-Smith"
  - "Dustin Carlino"
  - "Angus Calder"
  - "Congying Hu"
  - "Matthew Davis"
  - "Joseph Talbot"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Journal of Transport Geography
**Year:** 2026

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2026.104549) [Publisher Link](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0966692326000037) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Zhao Wang, Hang Hu, Hussein Mahfouz, Juan Pablo Fonseca-Zamora, Martin Lucas-Smith, Dustin Carlino, Angus Calder, Congying Hu, Matthew Davis, Joseph Talbot, and Robin Lovelace (2026). Corenet: A flexible framework for generating and prioritising core cycle network designs. *Journal of Transport Geography*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2026.104549

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{wang_corenet_2026,
  title = {Corenet: A flexible framework for generating and prioritising core cycle network designs},
  author = {Wang, Zhao and Hu, Hang and Mahfouz, Hussein and Fonseca-Zamora, Juan Pablo and Lucas-Smith, Martin and Carlino, Dustin and Calder, Angus and Hu, Congying and Davis, Matthew and Talbot, Joseph and Lovelace, Robin},
  date = {2026-02},
  journaltitle = {Journal of Transport Geography},
  volume = {131},
  issn = {0966-6923},
  doi = {10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2026.104549},
  url = {https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0966692326000037},
  pages = {104549},
  langid = {english}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
